message: build: add build-shell target and vm-image dependency

files.patch:
@@ -1,11 +1,15 @@
-.PHONY: all build proto clean test test-unit lint fmt install uninstall deploy
+.PHONY: all build build-shell proto clean test test-unit lint fmt install uninstall deploy
 
 all: proto build
 
 build:
 	go build -o bin/stockyard ./cmd/stockyard
 	go build -o bin/stockyardd ./cmd/stockyardd
 
+# Build stockyard-shell for VM (static binary for Linux)
+build-shell:
+	CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o vm-image/scripts/stockyard-shell/stockyard-shell ./cmd/stockyard-shell
+
 proto:
 	mkdir -p pkg/api/v1
 	protoc --go_out=. --go_opt=paths=source_relative \

@@ -7,13 +7,17 @@
 #   make clean    - Remove build artifacts
 #   make help     - Show this help
 
-.PHONY: all docker rootfs clean help
+.PHONY: all build-deps docker rootfs clean help
 
 # Default target: build everything
 all: rootfs
 
-# Build Docker image
-docker:
+# Build dependencies (stockyard-shell binary)
+build-deps:
+	$(MAKE) -C .. build-shell
+
+# Build Docker image (depends on shell binary)
+docker: build-deps
 	@./build.sh
 
 # Convert to Firecracker rootfs (depends on docker image)
